message:
refactor(moe): add router-based MoE block for dynamic expert selection

Add encodeMoEBlockWithRouter() for functions that use router-based
expert selection instead of fixed VIP experts. This completes Phase 2C
of the codebase consolidation plan.

Changes:
- Add RouterMoEBlockParams struct for router-based MoE configuration
- Extend MoEEngine vtable with router functions:
  - encodeRouterLogits_Buffer_F16
  - encodeRouterTopKSoftmax
  - createCommandBuffer
  - commitAndWait
- Implement encodeMoEBlockWithRouter() which:
  - Encodes router logits and top-K softmax
  - Syncs to read expert IDs from GPU
  - Runs selected experts with auto Q2K/Q4K dispatch
  - Returns top-2 experts for prefetching
- Update forwardDraft to use shared router-based MoE block
  (~78 lines reduced to ~31 lines)

@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ const objc = @import("../inference/metal/objc.zig");
 
 const log = std.log.scoped(.moe_block);
 
-/// Parameters for encoding a complete MoE block
+/// Parameters for encoding a complete MoE block (VIP experts)
 pub const MoEBlockParams = struct {
     layer_idx: u32,
     n_embd: u32,
@@ -28,6 +28,21 @@ pub const MoEBlockParams = struct {
     experts: [2]u32,
 };
 
+/// Parameters for encoding a router-based MoE block (dynamic expert selection)
+pub const RouterMoEBlockParams = struct {
+    layer_idx: u32,
+    n_embd: u32,
+    n_ff: u32,
+    n_expert: u32,
+    buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_output: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_residual: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_router_weights: objc.MTLBuffer, // F16: "blk.{}.ffn_gate_inp.weight"
+    buf_router_logits: objc.MTLBuffer, // [n_expert] output
+    buf_moe_weights: objc.MTLBuffer, // [n_expert] softmax (sparse)
+    buf_expert_ids: objc.MTLBuffer, // [k] top-K indices
+};
+
 /// Interface for the Metal engine operations needed by MoE block
 pub const MoEEngine = struct {
     ptr: *anyopaque,
@@ -66,6 +81,28 @@ pub const MoEEngine = struct {
         getOrCreateHybridQ2KBuffer: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, name: []const u8) anyerror!objc.MTLBuffer,
         getOrCreateTensorBuffer: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, name: []const u8, offset: u64, size: u64) anyerror!objc.MTLBuffer,

+            buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,

+        commitAndWait: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer) void,
     };
 
     pub fn encodeZeroBuffer(self: MoEEngine, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, buf: objc.MTLBuffer, n: u32) !void {
@@ -145,6 +182,56 @@ pub const MoEEngine = struct {

 /// Tensor offset and size information
@@ -296,3 +383,112 @@ pub fn buildParams(
         .experts = experts,

 }
+
+/// Encode a MoE block with dynamic router-based expert selection
+///
+/// This pattern is used for single-token inference where the router dynamically
+/// selects top-K experts. The function:
+/// 1. Encodes router logits
+/// 2. Encodes top-K softmax selection
+/// 3. Commits and waits to read expert IDs
+/// 4. Creates new command buffer for expert FFN
+/// 5. Runs selected experts with auto Q2K/Q4K dispatch
+/// 6. Encodes residual addition
+///
+/// Returns the top-2 expert IDs for potential prefetching.
+///
+/// Note: Caller must provide an initial command buffer for router computation.
+/// The function creates a new command buffer for expert FFN execution.
+pub fn encodeMoEBlockWithRouter(
+    engine: MoEEngine,
+    loader: TensorLoader,
+    cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer,
+    params: RouterMoEBlockParams,
+) ![2]u32 {
+    // I. Router logits (F16 weights)
+    try engine.encodeRouterLogits_Buffer_F16(
+        cmd_buf,
+        params.buf_normed,
+        params.buf_router_weights,
+        params.buf_router_logits,
+        params.n_expert,
+        params.n_embd,
+    );
+
+    // J. Router Top-K softmax
+    try engine.encodeRouterTopKSoftmax(
+        cmd_buf,
+        params.buf_router_logits,
+        params.buf_moe_weights,
+        params.buf_expert_ids,
+        1, // n_tokens = 1 for single token
+        params.n_expert,
+        2, // top_k = 2
+    );
+
+    // Sync router computation to read expert IDs
+    engine.commitAndWait(cmd_buf);
+
+    // Read top-2 expert IDs from GPU
+    const expert_ids_ptr: [*]u32 = @ptrCast(@alignCast(objc.bufferContents(params.buf_expert_ids)));
+    const top_experts = [2]u32{ expert_ids_ptr[0], expert_ids_ptr[1] };
+
+    // Create new command buffer for expert FFN
+    const expert_cmd = engine.createCommandBuffer() orelse {
+        return error.MetalCommandBufferCreationFailed;
+    };
+
+    // K. Zero output accumulator
+    try engine.encodeZeroBuffer(expert_cmd, params.buf_output, params.n_embd);
+
+    // L. Run top-2 experts
+    for (top_experts) |expert_idx| {
+        try encodeExpertWithAutoSource(
+            engine,
+            loader,
+            expert_cmd,
+            params.layer_idx,
+            expert_idx,
+            params.n_embd,
+            params.n_ff,
+            params.buf_normed,
+            params.buf_output,
+            params.buf_moe_weights, // Use router-computed softmax weights
+        );
+    }
+
+    // M. Residual add
+    try engine.encodeAdd(expert_cmd, params.buf_residual, params.buf_output, params.buf_residual, params.n_embd);
+    engine.commitAndWait(expert_cmd);
+
+    return top_experts;
+}
+
+/// Build RouterMoEBlockParams from common engine buffers
+pub fn buildRouterParams(
+    layer_idx: u32,
+    n_embd: u32,
+    n_ff: u32,
+    n_expert: u32,
+    buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_output: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_residual: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_router_weights: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_router_logits: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_moe_weights: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_expert_ids: objc.MTLBuffer,
+) RouterMoEBlockParams {
+    return RouterMoEBlockParams{
+        .layer_idx = layer_idx,
+        .n_embd = n_embd,
+        .n_ff = n_ff,
+        .n_expert = n_expert,
+        .buf_normed = buf_normed,
+        .buf_output = buf_output,
+        .buf_residual = buf_residual,
+        .buf_router_weights = buf_router_weights,
+        .buf_router_logits = buf_router_logits,
+        .buf_moe_weights = buf_moe_weights,
+        .buf_expert_ids = buf_expert_ids,
+    };
+}
